cityDNA.coreFantasy: A wind-exposed flightless-avian border city where walls, foundries, relief halls, observatories, training arenas, and wind-crown government make vigilance civic.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Kassovar Reach is not a flying-avian nest city; it commands ground through stride, height, sightlines, watch duty, and civic support systems.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Kassovar Reach turns long legs, long sight, wind, border defense, forge support, relief, astronomy, and training into readiness as public service.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Cedar, hide, rammed earth, turquoise inlay, dyed wool, border walls, feather-fan roofs, wind-stilt towers, blue watch lamps, forge smoke, relief plazas, observatory towers, training courts, and woven banners.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Long-legged flightless avian folk whose height expresses grounded vigilance rather than flight envy.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Feather fans, wind stilts, border lamps, watch bastions, star instruments, relief notices, forge smoke, and champion gates symbolize vigilance as service.

canonLocks: Wonder: Strider Wind-Stilt Aerie of the Long Legs.
Seat of Power: Feather Fan Roofs Wind-Crown Seat.
Districts: Fortress / Border Wall, Heavy Industry / Foundry, Civic Services, Observatory / Astronomy, Arena / Training.

Exact uploaded anchors include Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook, Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook, Civic Services Hall, Relief Hall, Civic Services Lantern Monument, Notice Plaza Nook, Observatory / Astronomy Civic Hall, Star Observatory, Star Navigation Monument, Celestial Court Nook, Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, and Champion Gate Nook.
provisionalCanon: Kassovar Reach's highest virtue is vigilance.
The image pass confirms exposed plazas, long stairs, watch platforms, and frontier sightlines.
rejectedReads: defense isolated from relief, forge, observatory, and training
cautionFlags: Use long-legged ground movement, not flight perches.
Keep defense and civic care paired.

environment.environmentalLogic: The uploaded images make wind, open approaches, height, and long sightlines into civic infrastructure.

forms: Strider Wind-Stilt Aerie of the Long Legs
skyline: Feather Fan Roofs Wind-Crown Seat as authority
star observatory, forge smoke, relief halls, and training banners on exposed terraces

civilization.people: Citizens are long-legged flightless avian folk: tall, watchful, stride-oriented, socially formal, and trained to read distance, dust, and horizon movement.
civilization.governance: Wind-Crown authority assigns watch, relief, star-route interpretation, forge support, and training duties.
civilization.religion: Wind rites, star watching, banner ceremonies, and watch oaths replace flight worship.

streets.appearance: High, windy, exposed, and disciplined with border walls, blue watch lamps, long stairs, forge halls, relief plazas, star towers, and training courts.
streets.movement: Movement follows long stairs, wall walks, wind-stilt platforms, forge roads, relief routes, observatory paths, and training courts.
streets.lighting: Hard daylight exposes plazas; blue lamps, forge glow, observatory light, and arena torches define night.
streets.weatherEffects: Wind, dust, glare, and horizon haze alter visibility and public readiness.
streets.dayCycle: Watch changes, forge work, relief rosters, and drills dominate the day.
streets.nightCycle: Blue watch lamps, observatory work, wall patrols, and arena readiness dominate night.

housing.wealthy: Wind-Crown and watch-family homes with high views and feather-fan roofs.
housing.middle: Forge, relief, and observatory family homes with long steps and windbreaks.
housing.poor: Border-edge housing and relief-dependent courts near service routes.

districts.name: Fortress / Border Wall
districts.civicPurpose: Frontier warning, perimeter responsibility, watch duty, and public defense.
districts.visualIdentity: Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall Beacon, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook.

districts.name: Heavy Industry / Foundry
districts.civicPurpose: Forge support, repair, and industrial readiness.
districts.visualIdentity: Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook.

districts.name: Civic Services
districts.civicPurpose: Public aid, relief rosters, and emergency coordination.
districts.visualIdentity: Civic Services Hall, Relief Hall, Civic Services Lantern Monument, Notice Plaza Nook.

districts.name: Observatory / Astronomy
districts.civicPurpose: Navigation, long-range watching, sky law, and route planning.
districts.visualIdentity: Observatory / Astronomy Civic Hall, Star Observatory, Star Navigation Monument, Celestial Court Nook.

districts.name: Arena / Training
districts.civicPurpose: Leg discipline, readiness, and frontier endurance.
districts.visualIdentity: Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, Champion Gate Nook.

wonder.name: Strider Wind-Stilt Aerie of the Long Legs
wonder.symbolicRole: Height, stride, wind, and civic watching without flight.
wonder.visualRole: Wind-stilt aerie of high platforms, feather-fan rooflines, and horizon terraces.
wonder.civicRole: Watch rites, horizon observance, and discipline vows.
storyHooks: A wind-stilt rite proves vigilance is service, not suspicion.

beacon.name: Border Wall Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: The wall as first warning system.
beacon.visualRole: Blue-lit beacon embedded in fortress wall and watch bastions.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates watch posts, relief halls, forge support, observatory staff, and training grounds.
storyHooks: A Beacon change sends relief clerks and forge crews moving as fast as guards.

seatOfPower.name: Feather Fan Roofs Wind-Crown Seat
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Watch authority and public records made government.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Central authority with feather-fan roofs, terraces, command platforms, and blue lamps.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Border rulings, relief decisions, watch assignments, and star-route disputes.
storyHooks: A Wind-Crown order reveals who vigilance protects.

majorLandmarks.name: Great Forge
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Forge halls, smoke stacks, and crucible court.
storyHooks: A forge delay weakens the watch system.

majorLandmarks.name: Relief Hall
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Notice plaza, blue lamps, ration counters, and rosters.
storyHooks: A relief roster shows the wall already failed someone.

majorLandmarks.name: Star Observatory
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Lenses, star monument, and high platforms.
storyHooks: An observatory reading says the threat is behind the watchers.

majorLandmarks.name: Training Arena
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Long-legged lanes, champion gate, woven banners.
storyHooks: A champion gate test rewards the citizen who notices danger first.

districtDioramaGuidance: S1: Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall Beacon, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook.
S2: Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook.
S3: Civic Services Hall, Relief Hall, Civic Services Lantern Monument, Notice Plaza Nook.
S4: Observatory / Astronomy Civic Hall, Star Observatory, Star Navigation Monument, Celestial Court Nook.
S5: Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, Champion Gate Nook.
mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Strider Wind-Stilt Aerie, Border Wall Beacon, and Feather Fan Roofs Wind-Crown Seat legible together.
Use long stairs, wind-stilt towers, border walls, relief plazas, observatories, forge smoke, and training banners.
requiredVisualElements: Strider Wind-Stilt Aerie of the Long Legs
